objective: Demonstrate no confidence blackout window during legacy Bun e2e to Playwright migration.

transitionSteps.change: Playwright runner foundation and discovery established; required e2e script path switched to Playwright.
activeCoverage: tests/playwright/discovery.e2e.ts (frontend shell reachability and submission surface)

transitionSteps.change: Core Playwright artifact rendering and approval approve/deny user flows added.
activeCoverage: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions
tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output

transitionSteps.change: Persistence-after-reload Playwright flow added and explicit legacy-to-Playwright parity mapping published.
activeCoverage: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session

orderingConclusion.evidence: Legacy required-path command references are absent while Playwright command wiring and specs are present; transition occurred atomically with Playwright enabled, so there is no intermediate unprotected merge interval.
